LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, PLAINTIFF BERNICE WARE MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. MATTER NOT ARGUED. MOTION IS GRANTED. CALIFORNIA HAS A STRONG POLICY OF LIBERALLY ALLOWING AMENDMENTS TO PLEADINGS. NEITHER DEFENDANT 909 GEARY STREET LLC NOR PROPOSED DEFENDANT DIPAKBHAI PATEL HAS SHOWN THAT IT OR HE WILL SUFFER LEGAL PREJUDICE IF THE MOTION IS GRANTED. ANY DEFICIENCY IN THE ALTER EGO ALLEGATIONS OR ANY OF THE NEW ALLEGATIONS CAN BE RAISED AND IS MORE PROPERLY ADJUDICATED ON A PLEADING MOTION SUCH AS A DEMURRER OR MOTION TO STRIKE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG (302/HK)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-03-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Vacated

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Text Ruling

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Micheal A. Thompson, of Law Offices of Micheal Thompson, Tel. 707.643.2122, for plaintiffs Bernice Ware;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PLAINTIFF BERNICE WARE Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted. California has a strong policy of liberally allowing amendments to pleadings. Neither defendant 909 Geary Street LLC nor proposed defendant Dipakbhai Patel has shown that it or he will suffer legal prejudice if the motion is granted. Any deficiency in the alter ego allegations or any of the new allegations can be raised and is more properly adjudicated on a pleading motion such as a demurrer or motion to strike. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-23-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
